name: HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card
exclusions: Fuel transactions do not accrue Reward Points
EasyEMI transactions do not accrue Reward Points
E-wallet loading transactions do not accrue Reward Points
Rent payments do not earn Reward Points
Government-related transactions do not earn Reward Points
Reward Points are reversed if a retail transaction is converted into SmartEMI
milestoneBenefits: Rs 1,500 worth vouchers from brands like Marriott Experience, Barbeque Nation, Lakme Salon, O2 Spa, Decathlon, McDonald's or Domino's on quarterly spends of Rs 1.5 lakh
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh or more
additionalBenefits: Buy 1 Get 1 free on weekend movie and non-movie tickets via BookMyShow, up to 2 free tickets every calendar month, capped at Rs 250 per ticket
5X Reward Points on online food orders on Swiggy and Zomato, aligned to the current reward structure
Up to 10X Reward Points on spends via SmartBuy, aligned to the current reward structure
Complimentary annual memberships of Swiggy One and Times Prime as welcome benefit on Rs 75,000 spends in first 90 days
Complimentary lounge access of 2 domestic plus 1 international per calendar quarter will be available only on spends of Rs 60,000 or more in the preceding calendar quarter, effective from 1 July 2026
Extra 10% off on Dineout bills at participating restaurants
additionalDetails: Reward Points earnings revised to 4 Reward Points for every Rs 200 spent on eligible categories, effective 15 May 2026
Reward Points on insurance transactions are capped at 2,000 per day
Reward Points on grocery transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on utility transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on telecom transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
DCC markup revised to 1.75% on INR-denominated international and overseas-registered merchant transactions, effective 15 May 2026
Card reissuance fee revised to Rs 199 for lost, stolen or damaged cards, effective 15 May 2026
Fuel surcharge waiver is not applicable, as listed in HDFC MITC updated on 25 May 2026

salaried: Net salary of Rs 35,000 or more per month
